mapper.insert: INSERT INTO oa_attendance (employee_id, work_date, check_in, check_out, check_in_ip, check_out_ip, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{employeeId}, #{workDate}, #{checkIn}, #{checkOut}, #{checkInIp}, #{checkOutIp}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT a.*, e.name as employee_name FROM oa_attendance a LEFT JOIN oa_employee e ON a.employee_id = e.id WHERE a.employee_id = #{employeeId} AND a.work_date = #{workDate}
SELECT a.*, e.name as employee_name FROM oa_attendance a LEFT JOIN oa_employee e ON a.employee_id = e.id WHERE a.id = #{id}

SELECT a.*, emp.name as employee_name FROM oa_attendance a LEFT JOIN oa_employee emp ON a.employee_id = emp.id
ORDER BY a.work_date DESC, a.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM oa_attendance a LEFT JOIN oa_employee emp ON a.employee_id = emp.id

SELECT a.status as status, COUNT(*) as count FROM oa_attendance a LEFT JOIN oa_employee emp ON a.employee_id = emp.id
GROUP BY a.status
